span.p:
Create Submission Detail
answer JSONB saved

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
grading-dispatch.prepare()
Set status = processing
(inside DB transaction)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
grading-dispatch.dispatch()
XADD grading:tasks
JSON payload to Redis Stream

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
writing.grade()
Extract text + taskType
Call provider-configurable LLM
4 criteria scoring

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
speaking.grade()
Read uploaded audio
Call provider-configurable STT
Transcript to LLM grading
4 criteria scoring

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Calculate overall score
avg 4 criteria, snap to 0.5
Determine band

span.p:
XADD grading:results
status + score + feedback
confidence + metadata

span.p:
XADD grading:results
failure marker + error info
